programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Clash of Generations in South Carolina
programs.desc: A young, single entrepreneur wants to buy an older bungalow near downtown Greenville, S.C., to be close to her clients; however, her mother thinks she should buy a new, contemporary home with enough space for a future family.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Big Dreams vs. Frugal Fancies in Arizona
programs.desc: A couple looks for a new home their family can grow into in Phoenix; he's willing to spend more for a super-sized, move-in ready house while she's more frugal and hopes to put a little sweat equity into a smaller place.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A husband and wife in Chicago have big differences in their dreams for a home; unwilling to compromise or move out of his comfort zone, he hires his old college buddy to be their real estate agent, hoping it will give him an edge.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: The Value of Friendship in Manta
programs.desc: Newlyweds want to find a tropical vacation getaway in Manta, Ecuador, and luckily have a friend in the area who works in the real estate business.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: After three years of sharing space with friends, a couple wants to find a beachfront home of their own.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: A Crucial Life Change in Crucita
programs.desc: After years of working sixteen-hour days, a man has decided to find an oceanfront retreat where he can find tranquility.
